channel.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

image.title: BBC Weather - Forecast for Cardiff, GB

item.title: Today: Light Rain Showers, Minimum Temperature: 7°C (44°F) Maximum Temperature: 15°C (59°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 15°C (59°F), Minimum Temperature: 7°C (44°F), Wind Direction: south-easterly, Wind Speed: 6mph, Visibility: Moderate, Pressure: 1014mb, Humidity: 85%, UV Risk: 3, Pollution: Moderate, Sunrise: 06:50 GMT, Sunset: 18:00 GMT

item.title: Friday: Thick Cloud, Minimum Temperature: 6°C (43°F) Maximum Temperature: 10°C (50°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 10°C (50°F), Minimum Temperature: 6°C (43°F), Wind Direction: northerly, Wind Speed: 6mph, Visibility: Very Good, Pressure: 1023mb, Humidity: 80%, UV Risk: 1, Pollution: Moderate, Sunrise: 06:48 GMT, Sunset: 18:01 GMT

item.title: Saturday: Drizzle, Minimum Temperature: 7°C (45°F) Maximum Temperature: 11°C (53°F)
item.description: Maximum Temperature: 11°C (53°F), Minimum Temperature: 7°C (45°F), Wind Direction: north-easterly, Wind Speed: 6mph, Visibility: Good, Pressure: 1026mb, Humidity: 88%, UV Risk: 1, Pollution: Moderate, Sunrise: 06:46 GMT, Sunset: 18:03 GMT
